__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus datasource scraping the Pfxhttp metrics endpoint.

description: Operational dashboard for Pfxhttp/PostfixToHTTP Prometheus metrics. Built for Grafana 11 classic dashboard imports.

panels.description: Prometheus target health filtered to scrape targets that expose Pfxhttp metrics.

targets.expr: min(up{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} and on (job, instance) count by (job, instance) (max_over_time(pfxhttp_observability_startups_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__range])))

panels.title: Scrape Health

panels.description: Application-level request throughput across socket map, policy service, and Dovecot SASL handlers.

targets.expr: sum(rate(pfxhttp_application_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", outcome=~"$outcome"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Application RPS

panels.description: Share of application requests ending in error, tempfail, or timeout.

targets.expr: 100 * sum(rate(pfxhttp_application_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", outcome=~"error|tempfail|timeout"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(pfxhttp_application_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.000001)

panels.title: Application Issues

panels.description: Currently active accepted listener connections.

targets.expr: sum(pfxhttp_listener_active_connections{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"})

panels.title: Active Connections

panels.description: Combined outbound backend request rate for HTTP and gRPC backends.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(pfxhttp_backend_http_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))

panels.title: Backend RPS

panels.description: Share of outbound backend requests whose normalized result is not ok.

targets.expr: 100 * ((sum(rate(pfxhttp_backend_http_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", result!="ok"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", result!="ok"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0))) / clamp_min((sum(rate(pfxhttp_backend_http_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (sum(rate(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)), 0.000001)

panels.title: Backend Issues

panels.description: Application request rate grouped by protocol component, configured name, and normalized outcome.

targets.expr: sum by (component, name, outcome) (rate(pfxhttp_application_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", outcome=~"$outcome"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Request Rate by Outcome

panels.description: p50, p95, and p99 protocol request duration from the application histogram.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, component, name) (rate(pfxhttp_application_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", outcome=~"$outcome"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, component, name) (rate(pfxhttp_application_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", outcome=~"$outcome"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, component, name) (rate(pfxhttp_application_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", outcome=~"$outcome"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Request Duration Quantiles

panels.description: Current application throughput grouped by component and name.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (component, name) (rate(pfxhttp_application_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", outcome=~"$outcome"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Top Application Traffic

panels.description: Application outcome mix for the selected time range.

targets.expr: sum by (outcome) (increase(pfxhttp_application_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", outcome=~"$outcome"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Outcome Mix in Range

panels.description: Detailed instantaneous application rates for quick triage.

targets.expr: sum by (job, instance, component, name, outcome) (rate(pfxhttp_application_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", outcome=~"$outcome"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Application Rate Table

panels.description: Open listener connections by listener kind and configured name.

targets.expr: sum by (component, name) (pfxhttp_listener_active_connections{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"})

panels.title: Active Connections by Listener

panels.description: Accept, close, and queue-full events by listener.

targets.expr: sum by (component, name, event, result) (rate(pfxhttp_listener_connections_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Listener Events

panels.description: Listener accept errors and worker-pool queue-full pressure.

targets.expr: sum by (component, name, event) (rate(pfxhttp_listener_connections_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", event=~"accept|queue_full", result="error"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Listener Errors and Queue Pressure

panels.description: Connection lifetime quantiles per listener. Long-lived SASL exchanges and blocked clients show up here.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, component, name) (rate(pfxhttp_listener_connection_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, component, name) (rate(pfxhttp_listener_connection_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: Listener Connection Duration

panels.description: Total listener events in the selected range.

targets.expr: sum by (component, name, event, result) (increase(pfxhttp_listener_connections_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Listener Events in Range

panels.description: Outbound HTTP backend request rate by component, receiver name, method, status class, and result.

targets.expr: sum by (component, name, method, status_class, result) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_http_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: HTTP Backend Request Rate

panels.description: p50, p95, and p99 outbound HTTP backend latency.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, component, name, method) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, component, name, method) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, component, name, method) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: HTTP Backend Duration

panels.description: HTTP backend traffic by status class.

targets.expr: sum by (status_class) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_http_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: HTTP Status Classes

panels.description: HTTP backend failures and 5xx/status-code results.

targets.expr: sum by (component, name, method, status_class, result) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_http_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", result!="ok"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: HTTP Backend Failures

panels.description: Highest-volume HTTP backend callers in the selected range.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (component, name, method) (increase(pfxhttp_backend_http_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__range])))

panels.title: Top HTTP Backend Volume

panels.description: Outbound gRPC backend request rate by component, receiver name, method, gRPC status, and result.

targets.expr: sum by (component, name, method, status, result) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: gRPC Backend Request Rate

panels.description: p50, p95, and p99 outbound gRPC backend latency.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, component, name, method) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, component, name, method) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, component, name, method) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: gRPC Backend Duration

panels.description: gRPC backend traffic by gRPC status.

targets.expr: sum by (status) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: gRPC Status Codes

panels.description: gRPC backend calls whose normalized result is not ok.

targets.expr: sum by (component, name, method, status, result) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name", result!="ok"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: gRPC Backend Failures

panels.description: Highest-volume gRPC backend callers in the selected range.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (component, name, method) (increase(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_requests_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$name"}[$__range])))

panels.title: Top gRPC Backend Volume

panels.description: Nauthilus-style request latency distribution per listener. The query collapses map/receiver names and feeds Grafana a p95 latency time series; Grafana renders the value distribution with latency on the X axis and sample count on the Y axis.

targets.expr: avg(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(pfxhttp_application_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", listener=~"$listener", outcome=~"$outcome"}[$__rate_interval]))) > 0)

panels.title: Ingress request latency - $listener

panels.description: Nauthilus-style outbound backend latency distribution per backend/map name. HTTP and gRPC backend durations are shown as separate p95 latency series when data exists.

targets.expr: avg(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$backend"}[$__rate_interval]))) > 0)

avg(histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(pfxhttp_backend_grpc_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", component=~"$component", name=~"$backend"}[$__rate_interval]))) > 0)

panels.title: Backend latency - $backend

panels.description: Go runtime scheduler capacity. The default Go collector does not expose process CPU usage; CPU needs the optional process collector or host/container metrics.

targets.expr: go_threads{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} and on (job, instance) count by (job, instance) (pfxhttp_observability_startups_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})
go_sched_gomaxprocs_threads{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} and on (job, instance) count by (job, instance) (pfxhttp_observability_startups_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})

panels.title: Go Scheduler

panels.description: Resident process memory and Go heap allocation filtered to Pfxhttp scrape targets. Requires prometheus_runtime_metrics.

targets.expr: process_resident_memory_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} and on (job, instance) count by (job, instance) (pfxhttp_observability_startups_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})
go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} and on (job, instance) count by (job, instance) (pfxhttp_observability_startups_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})

panels.title: Memory

panels.description: Go goroutines from the optional Prometheus Go collector, filtered to Pfxhttp scrape targets.

targets.expr: go_goroutines{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} and on (job, instance) count by (job, instance) (pfxhttp_observability_startups_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})

panels.title: Goroutines

panels.description: Go allocation churn and GC duration filtered to Pfxhttp scrape targets. Requires prometheus_runtime_metrics.

targets.expr: rate(go_memstats_mallocs_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval]) and on (job, instance) count by (job, instance) (pfxhttp_observability_startups_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})

go_gc_duration_seconds{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance", quantile=~"0.5|0.75|1"} and on (job, instance) count by (job, instance) (pfxhttp_observability_startups_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})

panels.title: Allocator and GC

panels.description: Prometheus endpoint startup and observability shutdown attempts by result.

targets.expr: sum by (result) (increase(pfxhttp_observability_startups_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__range]))
sum by (result) (increase(pfxhttp_observability_shutdowns_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Observability Lifecycle

panels.description: Prometheus scrape cost for selected Pfxhttp targets, useful when runtime metrics or high-cardinality labels grow.

targets.expr: scrape_duration_seconds{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} and on (job, instance) count by (job, instance) (pfxhttp_observability_startups_total{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"})

panels.title: Scrape Duration

title: Pfxhttp / PostfixToHTTP
